publications.title: Adapting infrastructure to changing climatic conditions: the case of transport infrastructure in Mongolia
publications.description: This policy paper analyses the mainstreaming of climate resilience into Mongolia's transport infrastructure before the bulk of the country's planned network is built.

publications.title: Building a safer society through science and technology: a compendium of Korea’s science and technology-based disaster management
publications.description: This casebook highlights the implementation of science and technology-based disaster management, featuring 24 Korean practices across four thematic areas, along with Korea's success factors and remaining challenges. It is available in English and Korean.

publications.title: Rapid disaster damage assessment using deep adversarial sliced Wasserstein domain adaptation
publications.description: This study investigates the use of unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) techniques for rapid damage assessment during disasters.

publications.title: Loss and damage beyond economics: exploring health as a non-economic loss in national climate planning
publications.description: The report offers a snapshot of how health-related Loss and Damage is reflected in national climate policy documents, examining the extent to which physical health, mental health, and health systems are integrated into climate planning and action.

publications.title: Preventing future zoonotic pandemics: strengthening national legal frameworks & international cooperation
publications.description: This report examines how national legal frameworks and international cooperation can help prevent future zoonotic pandemics, with a particular focus on the role of wildlife trade in the emergence and spread of infectious diseases.

publications.title: Multi-hazard exposure disproportionately affects vulnerable populations globally
publications.description: This study provides a global analysis of multi-hazard exposure and disparities in socio-economic vulnerabilities using data on hazard co-occurrence and population distribution for the period 2004–2017.

publications.title: Community-led drainage construction to reduce prolonged flooding
publications.description: This solutions brief shares practical and replicable local knowledge of this approach in Nij Goddimari village in Lalmonirhat, Bangladesh, a community which faces chronic flooding and waterlogging due to its proximity to the Saniajan River.

publications.title: State of the climate in Africa 2025
publications.description: This report provides a consolidated regional assessment, with authoritative information on key climate indicators, impacts and risks to support decision-making.

publications.title: Building a safer society through science and technology: a compendium of Korea’s science and technology-based disaster management
publications.description: This casebook highlights the implementation of science and technology-based disaster management, featuring 24 Korean practices across four thematic areas, along with Korea's success factors and remaining challenges. It is available in English and Korean.

publications.title: Financing heat resilience
publications.description: This report explores how governments can finance heat resilience through risk-informed investments, innovative financing mechanisms, and resilient infrastructure to protect lives, livelihoods, and economies from rising extreme heat risks.

publications.title: 24th Africa Working Group on Disaster Risk Reduction
publications.description: This outcome document of the 24th Africa Working Group on Disaster Risk Reduction.

publications.title: Barbados: Strengthening disaster resilience of MSMEs through business continuity planning: Guidance and sectoral templates
publications.description: This document provides guidance for Micro, Small and Medium-sized Enterprises (MSMEs) in Barbados to develop a basic Business Continuity Plan, eventually aligning with the highest international standards. It includes 5 sectoral templates.

publications.title: Strengthening the disaster resilience of SMEs in Sendai
publications.description: This landscape study assesses how SMEs in Sendai city  perceive climate change and disaster risks and how they assess the resilience of their companies and the cities in which they operate.

publications.title: UNDRR Annual Report 2025
publications.description: The UNDRR Annual Report 2025 presents several important achievements that UNDRR marked in the year 2025

publications.title: When digital systems fail: An expert report on the hidden risks of our digital world
publications.description: This expert report examines how digital infrastructure, now central to essential services such as healthcare, finance, and emergency response, is creating new forms of systemic risk through increasing interdependence.

publications.title: UNDRR Regional Office for Africa Quarterly Newsletter (Jan-Mar 2026)
publications.description: UNDRR's Regional Office for Africa has published its first quarterly newsletter of 2026, detailing the major achievements of the work being done by the organisation.

publications.title: Teaching resilience with the Stop Disasters game: a teacher's guide
publications.description: This Teacher’s Pack supports the use of the  Stop Disasters online game as a practical way to introduce disaster risk reduction (DRR) and resilience in the classroom.

publications.title: Concept note: The International day in memory of the victims of earthquakes
publications.description: The international day provides an annual opportunity for remembrance and renewed commitment to protecting lives and livelihoods from earthquake disasters.
